title: Use Cases | Your Product
description: A platform-site starter page for use cases, onboarding, or implementation fit.
heroTitle: Explain where the product works best
heroText: Use this route to show the use cases, teams, or implementation contexts where the platform is most useful.

cards.title: Who this is for
cards.text: Describe the teams, roles, or organisations that benefit most from the platform.

cards.title: Typical implementation context
cards.text: Explain whether the platform fits early-stage teams, larger operations, internal tools, external workflows, or mixed environments.

cards.title: What adoption looks like
cards.text: Set expectations around onboarding, setup, support, or how people usually start using the platform.

cards.title: What is not a fit
cards.text: Use this space for honest boundaries so the page reads like a real product page instead of a generic claim set.
